name: Ash of War: Dryleaf Whirlwind
description: Ash of War: Dryleaf Whirlwind is an Ash of War and Upgrade Material in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Ash of War in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Ash of War: Dryleaf Whirlwind provides Standard affinity and the Dryleaf Whirlwind Skill. Ashes of War can be equipped on Weapons and Shields to modify the Skill or an equipment, or to apply affinities that modify scaling values. Dryleaf Whirlwind is a powerful martial arts skill, that performs lightning-quick movements with a series of devastating kicks.

name: Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings
description: Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings is an Ash of War and Upgrade Material in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Ash of War in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings provides Sacred affinity and the Aspects of the Crucible: Wings Skill. Ashes of War can be equipped on Weapons and Shields to modify the Skill or an equipment, or to apply affinities that modify scaling values. The Aspects of the Crucible is a Flight attack that has a unique animation using Twinblades Weapons.

Ashes of War in Elden Ring are special items that allow you to grant your armaments (Weapons and Shields) new Skills and Affinities.
